candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; equals Net sales in preview and is the preferred candidate.
Not revenue; cost line.

Expense detail, not revenue.
Cost line, not revenue.

candidates.why: Direct COGS label and populated across years.
Equivalent COGS-style label, but duplicate of the main COGS row.
Semantically relevant but appears unpopulated/less specific here.

candidates.row_label: Cost of goods sold - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing row; must be excluded when direct component exists.

variables.notes: Used the direct COGS row, not the duplicate or balancing row.

candidates.why: Core SG&A overhead component.
Would be relevant if populated, but main Sales and marketing row already exists.
Dedicated R&D line above EBIT; include in XSGA as well so XSGA-XRD removes it.
Subcomponent of R&D rather than the main line; less preferred than the dedicated total R&D row.
Core SG&A overhead component.
Subcomponent/detail under administration expenses; prefer broader component row.
Subcomponent/detail under administration expenses; prefer broader component row.
Overhead bucket; include while excluding impairment-specific sublines and balancing rows.
Narrow non-recurring subcomponent; less suitable than the broader overhead bucket.
Too broad/generic and appears unpopulated; not preferred over explicit components.
Could be SG&A-like compensation, but appears supplemental and sign/presentation is unclear.
Personnel-related but likely spans functions including production, so may overlap COGS.

Balance sheet liability, not SG&A expense line.

Selected operating overhead components and included 'Research and development' because it is a dedicated above-EBIT expense line and does not appear embedded in the selected SG&A buckets; this allows PROF to use XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD correctly.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line above EBIT; best match.
Only the D&A subcomponent of R&D, not total R&D expense.
Subcomponent/detail of R&D, not preferred over the main R&D line.

variables.notes: Used the dedicated R&D line above EBIT.

candidates.why: Broader finance-cost line that includes interest and other items; useful fallback if interest expense line is unavailable in some years.
Direct interest expense line; preferred choice.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Only lease-related interest subcomponent, not total interest expense.
Not specifically interest.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental subcomponent only.

candidates.row_label: Accrued interest expense and other financial items
candidates.why: Balance sheet accrual, not income statement interest expense.

variables.notes: Priority list uses direct interest expense first, then broader financial expenses as fallback if needed.

candidates.row_label: Share of profit of equity-accounted investments
candidates.why: Income statement profit share, not book equity.
Income statement item, not equity on balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Equity holders of the parent company
candidates.why: Income statement profit attribution, not book equity.
OCI component, not total equity.

candidates.row_label: EPS attributable to equity holders of the parent company
candidates.why: Per-share metric, not equity.

candidates.row_label: Diluted EPS attributable to equity holders of the parent company
candidates.why: Per-share metric, not equity.
Not shareholders' equity.
Asset/investment, not equity.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to equity holders of the parent company
candidates.why: Best owner-equity line excluding non-controlling interests.
Total equity includes non-controlling interest, so less preferred for BE when NCI is separately available.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to equity holders of the parent company

variables.notes: Preferred parent/owners' equity to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet minority interest.
Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet minority interest.
Direct balance sheet NCI line; preferred.
